generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for measuring rotational position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataStream
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the gearwheel for measuring gearbox output position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M of the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataStream
]

instance MotorPositionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped angular position data of the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, SINUMERIKController
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped angular position data of the gearwheel output"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, SINUMERIKController
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time input current measurements of the motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, SINUMERIKController
]

instance AngularVelocityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity ω derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance MotorTorqueDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output torque τ_M of the permanent magnet synchronous motor derived from current and dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model for Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model for Stribeck friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model for Dahl friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model for LuGre friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell containing metadata for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) modeling of the robot's structural components"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for multi-physics friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for managing asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetMetadataService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical system to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for processing sensor data and providing position, speed, acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard for visualizing friction analysis and motion accuracy data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight, DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction simulation and measured data in unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction deviation analysis between simulated and measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction losses in the robot's first axis through comparison of simulated and measured data"
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of deviations between simulated and measured friction data for system optimization"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction simulation results and sensor data for monitoring"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters based on friction deviation analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing input current I_M and output torque τ_M for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel transmitting torque τ_G between motor and cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox producing output torque τ_out for the robot's first axis"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis system environment with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for structural modeling using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into structural model integrity and compliance"
]

instance AssetMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing asset metadata via Asset Administration Shell"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into asset metadata completeness and accuracy"
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time sensor data streaming via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into data streaming integrity and latency"
]

instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for processing sensor data using SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataProcessingInsight
]

instance DataProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into processed sensor data quality and accuracy"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for continuous friction model identification during robot operation, with live measurements synchronized to physical system dynamics."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A unified system integrating SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, live sensor data via MQTT, and AAS metadata, with processing components computing friction models and displaying integrated results in a dashboard for real-time analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') using live data from the robot during machining tasks, with no focus on design or manufacturing stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated friction models (white-box/black-box) and reference measurements, with model accuracy assessed against real-world torque and angular velocity data from encoders and current sensors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position, velocity) from physical robot to digital shadow, with data structured as time-series arrays for processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial asset metadata and SysML for model-based systems engineering, adhering to Industrie 4.0 standards."
]
